runs.root_cause: CVR improved +0.51pp (4.73%→5.24%) — C2O explains 86% of ΔCVR, driven by broad-based checkout improvement in MB · Paid · Google Ads (C2A +3.3pp, A2O +1.5pp) and a favourable catalogue mix shift toward lower-friction experiences. Italy domestic traffic surged +26.7% on seasonal ramp. About half the lift is seasonal (LY repeated same shape); structural_delta_cvr +0.23pp. HO segment diluted from scaling (+38.8% traffic) but absolute HO orders still grew +18%.

Headline CVR flat (−0.08pp) masking −12.6% order shortfall (1,941→1,696). Google Ads campaign serving the kens-tours.antelope-canyon-tours.com subdomain was paused on May 7, 2026 — daily traffic collapsed from 200–260 users/day to effectively zero in two days. The subdomain carried ~11% CVR; its removal cost ~294 forgone orders. Data-derived finding matched the documented mitigation cause (Ken's Tours legal Cease & Desist) to the day. C2O independently improved on the remaining catalogue, masking the volume loss in the headline CVR.
